title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University in Uganda uses AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic vaccine targets for early-onset breast cancer. The tools enabled analysis of 15,000 potential binding sites on a highly expressed protein, narrowing candidates to 15 viable targets for laboratory validation using minimal computational infrastructure.
